---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Command run (e.g. `pg_protoexport html capture.pcapng out.html`)
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages / stack traces).

## Capture file

If possible, attach a minimal `.pcap`/`.pcapng` that reproduces the issue.
Please ensure it contains no sensitive data.

## Environment

- pg_protoexport version: <!-- `pg_protoexport --version` or NuGet/release version -->
- OS: <!-- Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 14 ... -->
- .NET version (if running from source): <!-- `dotnet --version` -->
- pcap library: <!-- Npcap x.y / libpcap x.y -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help.
